name: the parity gate flags a rule whose original detector was dropped from enforced_by
command:
mkdir -p generated-code-quality-standards/x && printf 'source:
  id: t
rules:
- id: g-x-bad
  detector: cloud-guidance-rule.sh
  enforced_by:
  - tool: checkov
' > generated-code-quality-standards/x/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-applies-to-parity.sh" --root . 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'detector-not-preserved' e.txt && echo parity-catches-drop 1>&2
